extract: Thunderbolt (Japanese: １０まんボルト 100,000 Volts) is a damage-dealing Electric-type move introduced in Generation I. It is: TM24 in Generation I, from Generation III to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM36 in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. TR08 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM126 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM067 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. It can be upgraded to the special Z-Move Stoked Sparksurfer by Alolan Raichu holding Aloraichium Z, and to the special Z-Move 10,000,000 Volt Thunderbolt by Pikachu in a cap holding Pikashunium Z.
